assertions.description: signal_analysis.key_matrices reports 8 rows, 10 columns, 73 switches on matrix using net_name detection method. Stats show 79 switches total (73 matrix keys + stabilizers S1-S5 + reset RST1), which is consistent.
Row0-Row7 and Col0-Col9 nets use input-shaped global labels routed to ProMicro I/O pins. The KiCad ERC would flag these in isolation. Warnings are technically accurate per the label type.
